name: Greggs PLC
description: The UK's leading food-on-the-go retailer with 2,500+ shops, specialising in freshly prepared bakery food and hot drinks.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: New store openings (~150 net pa target), like-for-like sales growth from evening daypart expansion, delivery channel growth, and menu innovation.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Supply chain efficiencies from new manufacturing capacity. Food cost inflation moderating. Operating leverage from higher store volumes.
assumptions.risks: Consumer spending pressure, food cost inflation, labour market tightness, cannibalisation from rapid store rollout, competition from quick-service restaurants.
assumptions.catalyst: Evening trade expansion, delivery penetration, store count toward 3,000+ target, potential international pilot.
